nl_query: Identify all scripts where the cached total marks on the answer script row differs from the total marks on the latest active evaluation attempt by more than 0.5 marks, indicating a cache synchronization issue.
failed_sql:
SELECT a.id AS script_id, a.urn, sc.student_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at, (SUM(em.marks_awarded) - a.total_marks) AS discrepancy
FROM   answer_script a
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = sa.script_id AND ea.evaluator_id = sa.evaluator_id
JOIN   evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id
JOIN   student_cache sc ON sc.student_id = a.student_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'SUBMITTED'
  AND  a.is_active = TRUE
  AND  em.is_final = TRUE
GROUP  BY a.id, a.urn, sc.student_id, sc.name, sc.synced_at
HAVING (SUM(em.marks_awarded) - a.total_marks) > 0.5
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Type mismatch: answer_script.lifecycle_status (VARCHAR): boolean literal used on string column. Tip — integer/bigint columns need unquoted numeric literals (e.g. board_id = 5, not board_id = '5'). If you are filtering by a human-readable label like a course code or name, use the .code or .name VARCHAR column instead of the numeric .id column.
